title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. pyroloides
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. pyroloides, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. pyroloides include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Hieracium glaucinum subsp. pyroloides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
